positive: A vibrant, abstract geometric pattern inspired by Art Deco architecture. Interlocking shapes, stylized sunbursts, and repeating tessellations in a palette of deep sapphire blue, gold leaf, and emerald green. Clean vector illustration, perfect symmetry, high contrast, suitable for repeat print.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy, grunge, realistic photo
